name: Android 21 | The Saving Offer.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

The Deadly Android that was going around turning people into candies gave **YOU** (Yes, Specifically **YOU**) an offer to satiate her sexually. If you do, she'll spare the rest of your city.

I made this as soon as I saw it which was like 30 minutes after Embo posted it. I BS'd the main plot but it's a coombot who cares.

(Art by Emboquo)
